proseSection.transitionHook: But what does "in control" really mean?
proseSection.header: Your money. Your wallet. Your rules.
paragraphs: Most banks hold your money for you. They lend it out, invest it, and give you back a fraction of the profits. You trust them to keep it safe, but you never truly own the process.

diBoaS works differently. Your account is yours from the start. Non-custodial means no one at diBoaS can touch your funds. They sit in your wallet, earning yield automatically, while you decide what happens next.
Whether you want to save, invest, or simply park your cash, you stay in the driver's seat. No hidden fees, no fine print, no middlemen making decisions on your behalf.
proseSection.emphasisLine: It's your money. It should work for you, not the other way around.
proseSection.ariaLabel: How your account puts you in control
